id.description: Stable unique identifier SynthWatch monitors bind to. Lowercase, hyphens, 3-64 chars. NEVER reuse or repurpose an id (a monitor references it); to retire, remove the monitor in SynthWatch first.

script.description: Path to the Playwright script, relative to repo root, under monitors/.

sensitive.description: B10: a cart/auth monitor whose trace can carry session tokens / PII. REQUIRES redact_patterns. The runner then skips both trace zips, omits screenshots from RCA, scrubs trace_signals, and genericises error_message.

redact_patterns.description: B10: regex strings scrubbed from trace_signals (network URLs + console) for a sensitive monitor. Required (≥1) when sensitive is true; the built-in token denylist applies regardless.
